string.text: How long travel notifications stay on screen (seconds). See PDA Guide > Addons > Dorn's Fast Travel for travel rules.
Prevents crossing a level transition (on foot or via fast travel) while an alerted enemy is actively engaging you within ambush range. On by default.
Show Ambush Range on PDA Map
Draw a yellow circle on the PDA map for your current ambush detection radius (time, weather, and travel mode). Off by default.
Write extra travel details to the game log.
Show the route on the PDA when you right-click a destination, before you start travelling. Off by default.
Development keybind: increase Sneaking skill level by 1.
Development keybind: decrease Sneaking skill level by 1.
